title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is a generative UI demo application showcased at Google Cloud Next '26 that uses Flutter and Firebase with Gemini to generate personalized latte art images on demand. The app leverages agentic features and Agent-to-UI technology to enable real-time co-creation of customized user experiences.
writeup: This video breaks down GenLatte, a generative UI demo shown at Google Cloud Next '26 that combines Flutter and Firebase with Gemini to generate personalized latte art images on demand. It covers how agentic features and Agent-to-UI technology drive real-time co-creation of customized user experiences. The architecture matters as a concrete example of agentic UI, agent orchestration, and agentic loops applied to a working app rather than a concept.
